description.p: Modern GTK4 / Libadwaita launcher to run Minecraft Bedrock (GDK) on Linux using GDK-Proton. Includes ProxyPass integration for Microsoft login and custom server routing, plus an integrated setup wizard.
Oyun dosyaları dahil değildir; Minecraft Bedrock Windows sürümünü (Minecraft.Windows.exe) kendiniz sağlamalısınız.
GDK Launcher version 3.1. Major security and stability audit release.

ul.li: Added SHA-256 integrity verification for all downloaded dependencies (MiTM protection).
Improved Microsoft GameInput MSI extraction to use pure Python (no msiexec hangs).
Fixed Flatpak environment paths and improved Proton/Wine memory offset patching for UWP support.
Added atomic writes for config files to prevent data loss.
Enhanced Wayland compatibility and dynamic VKD3D workarounds for AMD GPUs.

description.p: GDK Launcher version 3.0. Stability improvements for the ProxyPass integration, fixes for game startup failure/hangs, and final general stability issues resolved. The launcher is now fully stable and ready for general use.
GDK Launcher version 2.4.5 final hotfix. Fixes the Flatpak bwrap mount and ldconfig 256 errors by ensuring correct directory paths exist prior to linking.
